a:T9da1,<div class="specification">
<p>The climograph shows data collected at Mangalore, India. The natural vegetation of the surrounding area is forest and the climate is tropical.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: center;">[Source: from: <em>The Physical Environment: An Introduction to Physical Geography</em>. Michael Ritter<br/>https://earthonlinemedia.com/ebooks/tpe_3e/]</p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Using the climograph, calculate the range of temperature.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Using the climograph, identify the relationship between maximum temperature and rainfall. </p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Using the climograph, outline the pattern of rainfall.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.iii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Natural forests in the area around Mangalore contain hardwood trees such as teak, <em>Tectona grandis</em>, which are deciduous, shedding their leaves once a year. Suggest, with a reason, when this might happen.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>The image shows a Gersmehl diagram of tropical rainforest.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: center;">[Source: © International Baccalaureate Organization 2019]</p>
<p style="text-align: left;"> </p>
<p style="text-align: left;">Explain what this diagram indicates about nutrients in this type of ecosystem.</p>
<div class="marks">[3]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>b:T7bf,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>«30 − 26 =» 4 «°C» ✔</p>
<p><em>Accept answers between 3 to 5 «°C».</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>maximum temperature occurs just when rainfall begins/at the onset of the rainy season/monsoon<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>negative relationship «as maximum temperature drops, rainfall increases» ✔</p>
<p><em>OWTTE</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>rainfall concentrated between April to December/peaks in June-August «followed by months with little/no rainfall» ✔</p>
<p><em>OWTTE</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.iii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. dry season/Jan/Feb ✔</p>
<p>b. «drop leaves» to prevent water loss/transpiration «since no rainfall for almost four months» ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. statement correctly explaining the quantity of nutrients in identified circle/circles ✔<br/><em>eg most nutrients are stored in biomass/equal quantities of nutrients stored in soil and litter.</em></p>
<p>b. statement correctly explaining high nutrient flow/transfer of any thick/large arrow ✔<br/><em>eg high transfer rate of nutrients from soil to biomass.</em></p>
<p>c. statement correctly explaining low nutrient flow/transfer of any thin arrow ✔<br/><em>eg low transfer rate of nutrients from litter to the outside/another ecosystem.</em></p>
<p>d. any statement correctly comparing nutrient storage/flow rates ✔<br/><em>eg higher nutrient transfer between soil and biomass than between biomass and litter OWTTE.</em></p>
<p>e. a Gersmehl diagram models «interrelationships between» nutrient stores and flows in an ecosystem ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>c:T4aa,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>Many could provide correct answers, but there were some who stated the range extremes instead of calculating the difference between them. Some also saw a correlation where there is none. </p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
[N/A]
<div class="question_part_label">a.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>Most outlined correctly the pattern of rainfall, but irrelevant answers were seen.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.iii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>Many provided correct answers, but also an important number could not relate the process to prevention of water loss during the dry months.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>Most candidates could realize that most nutrients were stored in biomass; it was nevertheless more difficult for many to explain and compare nutrient stores and flow rates using size of circles and arrows, although excellent answers were seen.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/c/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","c"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"19M.3.HL.TZ2.15"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"19M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","c-2-communities-and-ecosystems"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$c"}}]]}]]}]
